observations.archetype_gloss: The integrated center of the psyche, representing wholeness and unity
observations.summary: Dan's unconscious hand finding the Zuna stone, a familiar and grounding object, symbolizes his emerging Self, the center of his psyche seeking integration and stability amid darkness and exhaustion.

evidence.quote: He stopped by the hearth in the main room. The coals pulsed—crimson like the threads, exhausted and faint in the surrounding dark. Cool against his ribs hung the Zuna stone. He didn't reach for it consciously. His hand simply found it the way a hand finds familiar things in darkness.
